_comment: Codex-only hook set (magician). Referenced by .codex-plugin/plugin.json's `hooks` field so Codex uses THIS curated set, not the full Claude hooks/hooks.json. ${PLUGIN_ROOT} is Codex's OWN native variable (set for every plugin hook, no Claude required) and points to the installed plugin root, which contains scripts/. The wrapper then self-locates its python via dirname($0), so no env var is needed once it runs. Codex requires trusting plugin hooks via `/hooks` before they run.
